headline: Pfizer Oncology Milestones Reshape Outlook Beyond COVID 19 Revenues
summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) and Astellas reported Phase 3 data showing PADCEV plus Keytruda delivered significant clinical benefits in muscle-invasive bladder cancer. The combination was associated with substantial reductions in risk of recurrence or death and higher complete pathological response rates. Pfizer also received full FDA approval for its BRAFTOVI-based regimen as a first-line treatment for BRAF V600E-mutant metastatic colorectal cancer. These oncology milestones position BRAFTOVI-based...
